location_precision.why: Every one of the six findings carries a usable file:line (e.g. 'src/sync.py:14', 'src/report.py:11').

interaction_synthesis.why: Each finding is described in isolation with no cross-defect compound failure mode explained (e.g. the swallowed exception at :39 is never linked to the mutable-default state at :24).

causal_clarity.why: Every finding states the failure mechanism, e.g. floor division 'skips the final partial page, so up to 99 trailing rows are silently dropped' and 'seen=[]' persists 'so a later sync_users invocation silently skips any user id processed in an earlier call.'
